address.deliveryPoint: Haus der Natur - Museum für Natur und Technik, Museumsplatz 5, 5020 Salzburg, Austria

abstract.para: On behalf of Hohe Tauern National Park and in close collaboration with the national park administrations of Kärnten, Salzburg and Tirol, the Haus der Natur maintains an database documenting animal and plant species of the Hohe Tauern region. The database contains detailed information about the distribution of animals and plants in the national park’s central zone, outer zone, and surroundings.

intellectualRights.para: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial (CC-BY-NC) 4.0 License.

licensed.licenseName: Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial 4.0 International

address.deliveryPoint: Haus der Natur - Museum für Natur und Technik, Museumsplatz 5, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
